_comment: Synthetic engagement emails for the Brightwater account. 'restricted' sensitivity items are visible only to personas listed in acl (drives the permission-trimming governance demo). thread groups related mail.

emails.subject: ESCALATION: Brightwater migration cutover slipping — board demo at risk
emails.body: Owen, Nina — Brightwater is formally escalating. The data migration cutover that was committed for this sprint is slipping, and our board demo depends on it. We need (1) a committed recovery date, (2) confirmation the integration defects are contained, and (3) a written status to me by Thursday. This is now a relationship issue, not just a delivery one.

emails.subject: RE: ESCALATION: Brightwater migration cutover slipping
emails.body: Helen, acknowledged and owned. We commit to: a cutover recovery date of 26-JUN, contingent on closing the two open integration defects; a contained test plan with daily defect burn-down; and a written status to you by 12-JUN. Priya Deshmukh leads the recovery on our side and I am personally covering the engagement while Owen is on leave.

emails.subject: Open scope change — Brightwater reporting module not in current SOW
emails.body: Team — flagging an open scope-change discussion on Brightwater. The client has asked for a new self-service reporting module that is NOT in the current statement of work. This is additional scope and effort; we should not absorb it. Recommend we log a change request with an effort estimate and route it through Owen / the client program office before any work starts.

emails.subject: RE: Open scope change — Brightwater reporting module
emails.body: Priya — agreed it's new scope. Please send a change request with the estimated effort and timeline and we'll get it approved on our side. We do not expect it for free.

emails.subject: Brightwater engagement ownership while I'm on leave
emails.body: Confirming for the record: while I'm on leave (01-JUN to 28-JUN), Nina Alvarez covers Brightwater as Delivery Principal and Priya Deshmukh leads day-to-day delivery. The live items are the migration cutover (sprint 14) and the open reporting-module scope change. Engagement tracker is the source of truth for deliverables.

emails.subject: Brightwater weekly — deliverable movement w/c 08-JUN
emails.body: Weekly note: the migration cutover deliverable moved from 19-JUN to 26-JUN pending two integration defects. The integration test report remains on track for this week. The reporting-module scope change is logged as proposed, awaiting a change request. No other deliverable movement.
